hero.title: Color Palette Generator
hero.description: Generate beautiful color palettes directly in your browser.

flow.title: Generate → Adjust → Export
steps: Copy or export the finished palette

differences.title: Move from inspiration to reusable color values
differences.description: Color Palette Generator keeps palette generation, adjustment, copying, and export in one focused workspace.

items.title: Generate
items.description: Create a fresh five-color palette in one action.

items.title: Adjust
items.description: Lock colors you want to preserve while regenerating the rest.

items.title: Export
items.description: Copy values or download CSS variables and JSON.

feel.title: A visual workflow with practical outputs
feel.description: Every generated color remains visible with its reusable development and design values.

items.title: See the palette
items.description: Review five colors together in a responsive visual workspace.

items.title: Preserve favorites
items.description: Lock individual colors before generating another variation.

items.title: Use the colors
items.description: Copy HEX, RGB, or HSL values and export the full palette.

audiences.title: Who uses Color Palette Generator
audiences.description: Useful for anyone building a visual identity, interface, presentation, or creative project.

items.title: Designers
items.description: Explore and refine reusable visual palettes.

items.title: Developers
items.description: Copy color values or export ready-to-use CSS variables.

items.title: Creators and students
items.description: Build coordinated colors for presentations and projects.

resourceSection.title: Palette essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to generate, adjust, and export a useful palette.

items.title: Multiple formats
items.description: Use every color as HEX, RGB, or HSL.

items.title: Color locking
items.description: Keep selected colors unchanged across regeneration.

items.title: Browser exports
items.description: Download CSS variables or a JSON color array without a server.

groupedSection.title: Build and use a palette
groupedSection.description: Keep visual exploration and practical output connected.

items.name: Lock favorites
items.description: Preserve selected colors while changing the rest.

items.name: Copy values
items.description: Copy individual formats or the complete HEX palette.

items.name: Download files
items.description: Export reusable CSS variables and JSON.

technicalSection.title: Designed for private visual generation
technicalSection.description: Color Palette Generator follows the shared Ansiversa client-side utility architecture.
items: Browser-only palette generation with no saved history.

finalCta.title: Generate a color palette
finalCta.description: Open the generator to create, adjust, copy, and export five colors.
